metadata.description: MGSX Workflow-AI — turn any repository into a Spec-Driven Development harness (PRD → PROJECT → Feature → Slice → RDPI) with one command.

plugins.name: mgsx-workflow-ai
plugins.description: Bootstrap and run the MGSX Workflow-AI in any Claude Code project (new or existing): product layer (PRD/PROJECT), Spec-Driven Development with vertical slices, RDPI skills and review/audit agents.
